LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CENTRAL GARDENS, INC., VOLTAIRE RACADZG'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLTF'S COMPLAINT. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO PAGE 7 PARAGRAPH 28 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION; PAGE 8 PARAGRAPH'S 32-33 BECAUSE THE ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAHS 11-14 DO NOT ALLEGE RECKLESSNESS, OPPRESSION, FRAUD OR MALICE; PAGE 9 PARAGRAPH 40 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION; PAGE 10, ITEM 3 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION AND THE RULING ON PUNITIVE DAMAGES. WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DENIED AS TO PAGE 7 PARAGRAPH 26 AND PAGE 8 PARAGRAPH 30. THE ARBITRATION DECISION DOES NOT PRECLUDE PLAINTIFF FROM RELYING ON THE SAME CONDUCT TO STATE OTHER CLAIMS. Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Rosenberg, Esq., 415-675-7100 specially appearing for defendant and moving party Central Gardens, Inc. Voltaire Racadzg
Alfred Buchta, Esq., 925-743-8900 for plaintiff and opposing party Francisco Melvin Quirarte

Ruling:
Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT CENTRAL GARDENS, INC., VOLTAIRE RACADZG'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Complaint. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO PAGE 7 PARAGRAPH 28 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION; PAGE 8 PARAGRAPH'S 32-33 BECAUSE THE ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAHS 11-14 DO NOT ALLEGE RECKLESSNESS, OPPRESSION, FRAUD OR MALICE; PAGE 9 PARAGRAPH 40 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION; PAGE 10, ITEM 3 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION AND THE RULING ON PUNITIVE DAMAGES. WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
DENIED AS TO PAGE 7 PARAGRAPH 26 AND PAGE 8 PARAGRAPH 30. THE ARBITRATION DECISION DOES NOT PRECLUDE PLAINTIFF FROM RELYING ON THE SAME CONDUCT TO STATE OTHER CLAIMS. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600(302/PJM/AY)
